name: ghduty
description: GitHub mention duty — automated agent that checks issues/PRs that @-mention you across all repos and handles each action request itself: reply directly, /ticket on change requests, /code-review on review requests, optional Slack notify on pending tickets. First run works the whole open backlog; later runs handle new activity since the last run. Writes its timestamp only after processing, so it never marks mentions done without doing them. Built to run on a schedule.
